Girls Games (163)

Welcome to the Girls games hub on PlayArcadeX. Here you'll find 163 free girls games — creative and fun games including dress-up, makeover, cooking, care and design, with bright visuals and relaxing gameplay. Popular picks right now include Diana S City Fashion Beauty, Royal Dream Wedding, Fashion Tattoo Studio 4, My Tiny Cute Piano and Magical Unicorn Grooming World - Pony Care. Every game runs straight in your browser, with no download, no installation and no sign-up. Just click and play on your phone, tablet or computer.

About Girls Games

Girls games are creative and fun games including dress-up, makeover, cooking, care and design, with bright visuals and relaxing gameplay. On PlayArcadeX we keep this collection fresh, adding new girls titles regularly so there's always something new to try. Whether you have five minutes or an hour, you'll find a girls game here that fits.

All 163 girls games on this page are completely free and work on both desktop and mobile. If you enjoy girls games, bookmark this page and check back often — the lineup keeps growing.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are these Girls games free to play?

Yes. Every girls game on PlayArcadeX is 100% free to play, with no download, no installation and no payment required. Just open a game and start playing.

Can I play Girls games on mobile?

Absolutely. All girls games here run directly in your mobile browser on Android and iOS, as well as on tablets and desktop computers — no app needed.

What are the best Girls games to start with?

Great starting points include Diana S City Fashion Beauty, Royal Dream Wedding, Fashion Tattoo Studio 4. From there, browse the full list of 163 girls games above and find your favourites.
